{{Quote|So Ozzel decided to pay the hush money, eh? Hand it over!|Xoron Gulfel|<ref name="SWG:AED">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>}}
'''Xoron Gulfel''' was the [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] leader of an industrial espionage ring. Gulfel came to the attention of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] authorities, who had him [[Death/Legends|killed]] outside [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]] sometime after [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:TemplateThug.png|250px|thumb|Possible depictions of Xoron Gulfel]]
Xoron Gulfel was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]]. Due to the nature of many older [[W:c:swg:Quest|quests]] in ''Star Wars Galaxies'', the [[Species/Legends|species]], gender, and appearance of Gulfel changed each time a player performed this quest. Therefore, it is impossible to determine the [[canon]]ical species of Gulfel, which could have included any number of [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] species, such as [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] and [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]]. However, the quest dialogue given by [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] identified Gulfel as a male.
